name: rl-statsapi-listener
description: Local Rocket League StatsAPI listener and overlay helper.

scripts.check: npm run check:quick && npm run test:web
scripts.check:quick: npm run lint:format && npm run lint:python && npm run lint:docs && npm run test:python && npm run lint:js
scripts.lint:python: .venv/bin/python -m compileall -q listen.py obs_rl_statsapi.py rl_statsapi_listener integrations tests tools
